positive: A stylized illustration of a cosmic fox spirit (kitsune) seated majestically upon a glowing, ethereal crescent moon. The fox should have a flowing, layered tail of deep sapphire and celestial gold. The background is a swirling nebula of indigo, violet, and turquoise, accented by bright, stylized star clusters and soft, bokeh cosmic dust. The style is 'modern mythological vector art' with strong, clean linework and high-contrast color blocking. Central composition, full body shot, perfect for a repeating print or single apparel placement. Neon glow effect, volumetric lighting, symmetrical composition.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noisy, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, dirty, cartoonish, sketch, monochrome
